message:
test: pin memfd_create+pidfd_open+pidfd_send_signal conformance via diff harness

Adds tests/conformance_diff_memfd_pidfd.rs covering 3 functions:
- memfd_create: basic open, MFD_CLOEXEC verified via FD_CLOEXEC
  bit, write+pread round-trip
- pidfd_open: self pid + INT_MAX-pid edge
- pidfd_send_signal: bad-fd edge

Compares against direct libc::syscall(SYS_PIDFD_*) since glibc may
not expose pidfd wrappers in older builds.

7 tests pass, 0 divergences against glibc.

Bead: bd-mfpf1
